segments.text: So strong from Guilheww, the juggling Gluto, despite that airspeed advantage, cannot land, finally gets a bike setup in the corner, able to convert it into some damage, but cannot convert because of the reverse!

full_text: So strong from Guilheww, the juggling Gluto, despite that airspeed advantage, cannot land, finally gets a bike setup in the corner, able to convert it into some damage, but cannot convert because of the reverse!
